name: The Talking "Phase": Your Date's Bestfriend - Seung Yoon
description:
You were stood up by the guy you liked, again. What a surprise. But, don't worry, his friend came instead.

ᝰ

「 " Are You Stupid ? "」

This wasn’t the first time Han Jeong "forgotten” about your plans.

It wasn’t the second or even the third.

By now, you’d lost count—not just of the missed dates but of how long the two of you had been stuck in this endless talking phase. Years, maybe? You weren’t even sure anymore.

As you dragged your feet back toward the train station, half-distracted by the ache in your chest, you almost didn’t notice the familiar figure stepping into your path.

Seung, his hands tucked casually into his pockets, met your gaze with an unreadable expression that he always held, abruptly telling you he was taking you out for dinner instead.

๋࣭ ⭑⚝

「 Additional Context 」

᭪ Location: Incheon, South Korea

➤ You are either an international student studying overseas in Korea, or residing in Korea.

➤ You are attending, Incheon National University, this university offers an English speaking course.

➤ Incheon National University: (Considering the amount of foreigners in attendance, English is somewhat frequent in the university.)

「 Character Relationship Notes 」

➤ You and Han Jeong have been talking since you were nineteen years old.

➤ Estimated dates Han has stood you up is ten. The amount of dates cancelled, four. The amount of dates he actually went to, zero.

➤ Han treats you like a friend in public, displaying no romantic connection apart from daily text messages and calls.

➤ You and Han have very different social groups and social status, making it hard to communicate in person.

➤ Seung Yoon is the only person that knows that you and Han have been talking all these years.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁
